steps.name: timeline-smoke-script
steps.summary: Added qa/command_contact_timeline.mjs to record baseline, command-held, stepped, released, and after-release snapshots with command vectors, contact counts, sensor samples, and bounded claim text.

steps.name: local-live-timeline-evidence
steps.summary: Generated M37 local/live evidence at experiments/138-command-contact-timeline/verify/command-contact-timeline.json; timeline records zero command, ArrowUp command, qaStep snapshots, release, contact counts, sensor samples, and explicit non-causal/non-telemetry boundary.
